states.name: Dark Clarice
states.title: Maid of Darkness
states.description: A maid, by the name of Clarice, suddenly appeared in the Greyford palace. The silverware she polished was flawless, the morning tea was always at the perfect temperature, the hallways she cleaned did not have a speck of dust. She accomplished her every duty even before being ordered—truly, the perfect maid.

states.name: Dark Clarice
states.title: Maid of Darkness
states.description: However, her demeanor could hardly be called submissive. She would even defy the young queen. "You thought you could tame me? How utterly presumptuous." Stung by her words and thrown off by her whims, the courtiers soon formed a secret fan club.

states.name: Dark Clarice
states.title: Maid of Darkness
states.description: Within Clarice, Ludmilla was the immovable, absolute number one. That will never change. But she began to see flickering mirages of others in her cold, isolated world. These were colored differently. Colored with words like friendship and affection; words she had never known before.
